name: @metro-labs/railgun-mobile
description: Self-contained, version-pinned Railgun mobile bridge: the typed public bridge API + RN client, the Expo config plugins, and the pinned embedded-Node host dep set. Consumers import the barrel (or the documented subpaths); the nodejs-mobile host stays in apps/app/nodejs-assets (a fixed native-build convention).

comments.embeddedNodeHost: The pinned @railgun-community/* + native-prover versions the embedded Node host requires. These MIRROR apps/app/nodejs-assets/nodejs-project/package.json, which is the file the nodejs-mobile-react-native gradle bundler actually installs from (it reads <expoProjectRoot>/nodejs-assets/nodejs-project by fixed native convention, so the host cannot physically live in this package). Kept here as the single documented source of truth; bump both together.
